userDescription: Healthcare ontology graph with 12 entity types and 18 relationships. Use for: (1) Entity lookups by ID or name (provider PRV0000010, patient PAT0000001, claim CLM0009999), (2) Relationship traversals — trace claims to providers/payers/patients, follow prescriptions to medications, map provider-payer networks, (3) Care pathway exploration — patient encounters, diagnoses, prescriptions, adherence, vitals, SDOH, (4) Pattern discovery — denied claims with reasons, non-adherent patients, abnormal vitals, high readmission risk. Start with the entity closest to what the user asks about, then traverse outward. Limit to 10 results per hop.
